title: SGR to Diani transfer guide
content: Use transfer from Miritini SGR station to Diani. Typical route is Miritini to Likoni ferry then south coast road to Diani. Morning travel is recommended to avoid peak traffic.

title: Likoni ferry travel tips
content: Carry light luggage, keep valuables secure, and travel early when possible. Ferry queue times may increase during evening peak hours and holidays.

title: Payment support and escalation
content: For payment disputes, failed confirmations, or refund checks, escalate to live support immediately via official WhatsApp support so receipts can be validated.
